comment: Acceptable drift between the skills' canonical output and the committed examples/confidential-token/. Each pattern is a regex applied PER LINE to BOTH sides before comparison, stripping the matching line. Adding a pattern requires reviewer sign-off in the PR (the smoke-diff exists precisely to surface drift; widening must be intentional).

patterns.reason: timestamp comment emitted by future scaffolder versions
version field auto-bumps independently of dep-set drift
version-tagged HCU budget comment may differ across skill bumps

pinned_version_check._aliases_rationale: In the contracts/devDependencies block we expect the dev variant of the relayer SDK pinned to exact 0.4.1 (matching @fhevm/hardhat-plugin@0.4.2's exact peer). The frontend package.json (not cross-checked here) uses ^0.4.2 from the canonical entry. See pinned-versions.json @zama-fhe/relayer-sdk-dev.
